label: No Secret Exposure
rules: No API key value is stored in repository data.
No role can view secret material.
Endpoints may report secret configuration status only as booleans.

label: External App Isolation
rules: No role can touch FORJA, CEREBRO or DCFT in the backbone stage.
External app resources are denied by the Access Control Engine.
Integration contracts are required before real external connections.

label: Audit All Access Validation
rules: Every access validation attempt is recorded.
Denied attempts are stored with reason.
Audit events must not include secret values.
